description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Enter the world of musical trance with heavy metal and rock with this tantra t-shirt. Pair this cotton tee with denims and canvas shoes for all day comfort. And yeah, don't forget to hang on your headphones while walking down the street in this tee for that unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6' Shoulders: 18"
